query:
-- Hot projects with no contacts at all
SELECT COUNT(*) as hot_no_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp WHERE cp.projectId = p.id);

-- llm_inferred email coverage
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts WHERE contactTrustTier = 'llm_inferred';

-- Hot projects with only llm_inferred contacts (no email path available)
SELECT COUNT(*) as hot_only_llm
FROM (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
      WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
    )
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier != 'llm_inferred' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
) t;
